changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for consistency with naming standards
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes security controls related to monitoring inbound and outbound traffic. NetworkPolicies are correctly used for ingress and egress control. Audit logging is relevant for monitoring API server interactions, but the naming needed refinement for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure audit logging functions are prefixed with 'apiserver' to align with the resource they pertain to.
title: System Monitoring | Inbound and Outbound Communications Traffic
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4 (4) focuses on monitoring inbound and outbound communications traffic, which can be mapped to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies for controlling ingress and egress traffic. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logging can be used to monitor and log API server interactions, providing visibility into communication patterns and potential anomalies.
